# Copilot instructions — Agent Prompt Autoresearch

**Do not duplicate the workflow here.** The single source of truth is **[AGENT.md](../AGENT.md)** at the repository root: run `get_variant` → follow `.repo-autoresearch/autoresearch_instructions.md` → include the printed `[autoresearch:task=…:variant=…]` tag in the PR body.

If you cannot read that file: from the repo root run `python scripts/get_variant.py --task "<ticket-or-description>"` before writing code, then put the printed tag in the PR description.
